summary: Implemented ADR 0234 from the isolated latest-origin/main worktree by live-applying the shared PatternFly shell onto the interactive ops portal, updating the published ops-portal CSP for the pinned PatternFly asset, hardening the ops-portal runtime replay against macOS sidecar drift, and recording guest-local plus public-edge proof after obtaining an uncontended portal replay window.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with-requirements requirements/ops-portal.txt python -m pytest -q tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py tests/test_ops_portal_playbook.py tests/test_ops_portal.py tests/test_security_headers_audit.py` returned `48 passed`, while `make syntax-check-ops-portal` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces agent-standards` both passed on the isolated workstream branch before the protected mainline integration step.

verification.check: Canonical-truth branch gate and governed replay path
verification.observed: The branch-local `make live-apply-service service=ops_portal ...` path failed closed before mutation because canonical-truth generation would have rewritten protected `README.md` and `versions/stack.yaml` surfaces. The successful live apply used the direct governed sequence through `interface_contracts.py`, `promotion_pipeline.py`, `standby_capacity.py`, `service_redundancy.py`, `immutable_guest_replacement.py`, and `scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py` for `playbooks/services/ops_portal.yml`.

The scoped replay required `-e ops_portal_repo_root=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0234-live-apply-r2`. A replay without that override read from the top-level checkout and failed on missing controller-side inputs including `scripts/ops_portal/runtime_assurance.py`, `scripts/ops_portal/static/portal.js`, and `scripts/ops_portal/templates/partials/launcher.html`.

The final portal replay completed with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=130 changed=14 failed=0 skipped=15`. The corrective edge replay used `service:public-edge` for `interface_contracts.py`, emitted the promotion bypass for `public-edge`, and then ran `scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py` against `playbooks/services/public-edge.yml`, completing with `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=4 failed=0 skipped=14`.

verification.check: Guest hash, health, and shell proof
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0234-live-hashes.txt` captured `/opt/ops-portal/service/ops_portal/app.py` at `a3330585cae1c40bbaf005ff3398c700e1896f4e6f8a808dc20979e03104ec51`, `/opt/ops-portal/service/ops_portal/templates/base.html` at `165be89f07566c79fa2bd701833904ef8e51c81997eddd8f78f8ad5d2028da53`, a healthy `{"status":"ok"}` response from `http://127.0.0.1:8092/health`, and rendered shell markers for the PatternFly stylesheet, `/static/portal.js`, `LV3 Human Shell`, `Applications`, and `Connected Surfaces`.

verification.check: Rebased latest-main proof and public-edge CSP
verification.observed: After rebasing the worktree onto `origin/main` commit `73fb0ec1336d7b5540f51590f4b4f9a3a136577c`, the guest-local hashes and health check still matched the verified rollout, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0234-public-edge-check.txt` showed the public edge preserving the authenticated redirect plus the required CSP allowances: `script-src 'self' https://unpkg.com`, `style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com`, `img-src 'self' data: https://unpkg.com`, and `font-src 'self' data: https://unpkg.com`.

notes: Branch-local ops-portal applies share `/opt/ops-portal/service` on `docker-runtime-lv3`. Concurrent replays from other worktrees can clobber uploaded sources even when the controller checkout is isolated, so use an uncontended replay window before asserting guest hashes.
The worktree replay must pass `-e ops_portal_repo_root=<worktree>` or the controller-side sync can source files from the top-level checkout instead of the active branch worktree.

The branch-local `make live-apply-service` path remains intentionally guarded by canonical-truth generation. When protected mainline files must stay untouched, use the direct governed service replay and then record the proof in the workstream receipt.

The public-edge correction path uses `service:public-edge` for the contract gate and promotion bypass, but the capacity, redundancy, and immutable-guest guard scripts intentionally do not catalog `public-edge`; branch-local edge replays should call `scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py` directly.
